summary: Verified the 11-fix 'remove ALL dummy data' batch on /dashboard, /dashboard/growth-score, /dashboard/ai-visibility, /dashboard/auto-publish, /dashboard/analytics and /adminpanel/users/{userId}. All target data-testids render the correct empty/no-site states for the test user (who has no active site per the user dashboard). Admin user profile now loads real backend data (no USER_DETAIL fallback). GSC error toast verified via ?error=gsc_failed. NO dummy strings (USER_DETAIL 'Aarav Mehta', PULSE_DATA '74/100', PERF_ROWS, fake 'SEO Trends 2026' titles) detected in live runtime on the user-facing pages.

minor.issue: Returns 404/empty for the test user — frontend now gracefully renders empty/no-site states per the new spec. Non-blocking.

ui_bugs.issue: [data-testid=user-email] renders as EMPTY string for the inspected real user (e3156147-...). Backend returns user record but email field is empty/null OR mapping key is off. UI shows 'Unknown' for name and no visible email line — admin cannot see the user's email. Low-severity since rest of profile loads correctly with real data.

fix_verification_results.FIX_1_admin_user_profile: PASS — user-profile-page renders, user-full-name='Unknown' (real, not 'Aarav Mehta' dummy), user-plan-badge='Starter', user-subscription-status='TRIALING', Usage tab has 4 [data-testid^=usage-] progress bars, Billing tab has billing-plan-name + billing-monthly-price, Activity tab has admin-user-activity-log (showing real SITE_CONNECTED & USER_REGISTERED events with timestamps). Cascade delete: admin-delete-user-confirm-btn disabled before typing 'DELETE', enabled after typing 'DELETE'. NO 'Aarav Mehta'/'aarav@acmeinc.com' dummy strings. NOTE: user-email element exists but is empty (see ui_bugs).
fix_verification_results.FIX_2_user_dashboard_home: PASS — With no active site, ONLY [data-testid=welcome-banner] renders. dashboard-metrics-grid=ABSENT, trial-banner=ABSENT, activity-empty=ABSENT (because top-level welcome-banner replaces the metrics layout entirely). NO '74/100' dummy growth score visible. NO fake recent-activity rows. Screenshot confirms clean empty state.
fix_verification_results.FIX_3_growth_score: PASS — growth-no-site=TRUE (correct: no active site). growth-empty=FALSE, growth-score-value=FALSE (correct — no fallback rendering). NO '74/100' hardcoded number.
fix_verification_results.FIX_4_ai_visibility_pulse: PASS — ai-visibility-no-site=TRUE (correct: no active site). ai-visibility-empty / ai-visibility-first-scan-btn / ai-visibility-score=ABSENT (gated on site connection). No PULSE_DATA dummy data rendered.
fix_verification_results.FIX_6_auto_publish_calendar_and_perf: PASS — Calendar tab: calendar-no-site=TRUE, no fake titles like '10 SEO Trends 2026' present. Performance tab: perf-empty=TRUE renders empty state. perf-total-clicks element present (likely showing 0). NO PERF_ROWS or fake article titles in DOM.
fix_verification_results.FIX_7_analytics: PASS — analytics-no-site=TRUE (correct: no active site; takes precedence over gsc-not-connected per implementation). Page renders 'Connect a website first' empty card with Connect-website CTA. NO dummy SERIES/ARTICLES/SEARCH_TERMS rendered. gsc-not-connected & gsc-connect-btn correctly hidden when no site (per design — banner only appears when a site exists but GSC is unconnected).
fix_verification_results.FIX_11_gsc_error_handling: PASS — Visiting /dashboard/analytics?error=gsc_failed produced toast: 'Google connection failed. Please try again or contact support.' — exactly matching spec wording. (Note: 'Could not start Google Search Console connection' click-without-redirect path could not be tested because gsc-connect-btn is hidden in the no-site state — recommend re-testing after a site is connected.)
fix_verification_results.no_dummy_string_references: PASS — No USER_DETAIL/USERS_LIST/PULSE_DATA/PUBLISH_DATA/PERF_ROWS strings present in the live DOM of any user-facing page that was previously affected. The constants still exist in /app/frontend/src/admin/data/dummyData.js & /app/frontend/src/data/publicData.js (USERS_LIST is still imported by AdminContext.jsx as initial state for the in-memory store, which is acceptable until full backend wiring — but USER_DETAIL is no longer imported/used).

action_items: MEDIUM: Investigate why /adminpanel/users/{id} renders [data-testid=user-email] as an empty string for real users. Either backend GET /api/admin/users/{id} doesn't include email, or UserProfile.jsx is mapping the wrong key (e.g., `data.email` vs `data.user.email`). Admin should see the user's email.
LOW: Re-test FIX 11's 'Could not start Google Search Console connection' toast on the click path after a site is connected (gsc-connect-btn is gated on having an active site).

LOW (cleanup): /app/frontend/src/admin/data/dummyData.js still defines USERS_LIST/USER_DETAIL etc., and AdminContext.jsx imports USERS_LIST. Since admin user list/profile now hits real APIs, consider removing the seed import (or keep documented as initial in-memory cache).
critical_code_review_comments: Empty-state logic is well-structured: each affected page has a clear no-site → no-data → has-data ladder using distinct data-testids. Easy to test and reason about.
Admin user profile correctly uses adminApi.user(id) with proper loading/error states (user-profile-loading / user-profile-error data-testids present).
Cascade-delete confirmation pattern (type 'DELETE' to enable button) implemented correctly and verified working.
Spec wording for GSC error toast ('Google connection failed. Please try again or contact support.') exactly matches the implementation — good adherence to PRD.

success_rate.frontend: 100% on all 7 fix targets; 1 minor data-mapping ui_bug discovered (user-email empty on admin profile)

test_credentials: Admin: jalwa / jalwaisadmin (verified). User: test_1779193655@jalwa.com / TestPassword123! (verified — has no active site; admin shows site=maternityfeed.com but user dashboard does not surface it as activeSite, hence empty states).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 15 = dummy-data-purge verification. All 7 fixes PASS for the no-active-site empty-state path. To fully validate the 'data-present' path (FIX 2 metrics-grid, FIX 3 growth-score-value, FIX 4 ai-visibility-score, FIX 6 calendar-grid + perf-total-clicks numbers, FIX 7 charts/tables), a test user with a fully provisioned site + scans + GSC + published articles is needed. One real bug found: admin user-email element renders empty — needs backend mapping check.
rca_of_the_issue: user-email empty: most likely UserProfile.jsx is reading the email from a path that the backend doesn't populate (e.g., response.data.email is missing, while response.data.user.email or response.data.account.email is populated). To RCA: console.log the full response of adminApi.user(id) — if email is present in payload, fix the JSX mapping; if absent, fix the backend GET /api/admin/users/{id} to include email.
